function(x0: Set[Real]) { exists(k0: Real) { k0 > 0 and forall(x1: Real) { not x1 ∈ x0 or (-k0 <= x1 and x1 <= k0) } } = is_bounded_real_set(x0) }(Set.singleton(a))

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0 > 0 and forall(x0: Real) { s.contains(x0) implies -k0 <= x0 and x0 <= k0 } }
proof: function(x0: Set[Real]) { exists(k0: Real) { k0 > 0 and forall(x1: Real) { not x1 ∈ x0 or (-k0 <= x1 and x1 <= k0) } } = is_bounded_real_set(x0) }(s)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0 > 0 and forall(x0: Real) { t.contains(x0) implies -k0 <= x0 and x0 <= k0 } }
proof: function(x0: Set[Real]) { exists(k0: Real) { k0 > 0 and forall(x1: Real) { not x1 ∈ x0 or (-k0 <= x1 and x1 <= k0) } } = is_bounded_real_set(x0) }(t)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 <= x1 = x0 <= x1 }(bs, bs.max(bt))
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 <= x0.max(x1) }[Real](bs, bt)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 <= x1 = x0 <= x1 }(bt, bs.max(bt))
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 <= x1.max(x0) }[Real](bt, bs)
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0 > x1 and not x2 > x1 or x0.max(x2) > x1 }[Real](bs, 0, bt)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { not -x0 <= x1 or -x1 <= x0 }(-bs, bound)
function(x0: Real) { --x0 = x0 }(bs)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { not -x0 <= x1 or -x1 <= x0 }(-bt, bound)
function(x0: Real) { --x0 = x0 }(bt)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { not lib(relation_basic).is_transitive[T0](x0) or not x0(x1, x2) or not x0(x2, x3) or x0(x1, x3) }[Real](Real.lte, -bound, -bs, x)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { not lib(relation_basic).is_transitive[T0](x0) or not x0(x1, x2) or not x0(x2, x3) or x0(x1, x3) }[Real](Real.lte, x, bs, bound)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { not lib(relation_basic).is_transitive[T0](x0) or not x0(x1, x2) or not x0(x2, x3) or x0(x1, x3) }[Real](Real.lte, -bound, -bt, x)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { not lib(relation_basic).is_transitive[T0](x0) or not x0(x1, x2) or not x0(x2, x3) or x0(x1, x3) }[Real](Real.lte, x, bt, bound)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0 > 0 and forall(x0: Real) { s.union(t).contains(x0) implies -k0 <= x0 and x0 <= k0 } }
proof: function(x0: Real) { not (x0 > 0 and forall(x1: Real) { not x1 ∈ s ∪ t or (-x0 <= x1 and x1 <= x0) }) }(bound)
function(x0: Real) { not forall(x1: Real) { not x1 ∈ s ∪ t or (-x0 <= x1 and x1 <= x0) } or not x0 > 0 }(bound)
let w0: Real satisfy { w0 ∈ s ∪ t and (not -bound <= w0 or not w0 <= bound) }
function(x0: Real) { not x0 ∈ s ∪ t or (-bound <= x0 and x0 <= bound) }(w0)
function(x0: Set[Real]) { exists(k0: Real) { k0 > 0 and forall(x1: Real) { not x1 ∈ x0 or (-k0 <= x1 and x1 <= k0) } } = is_bounded_real_set(x0) }(s ∪ t)
